name: Peanut Butter n' Jelly Cookies
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Grape jelly (or your kid's favorite)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Beat butter and peanut butter together at medium speed until fluffy.
3. Gradually add sugar, beating well after each addition.
4. Add eggs and vanilla, beating well.
5. Combine flour and baking soda, stirring until well mixed.
6. Slowly incorporate the flour mixture into the butter mixture, blending thoroughly.
7. Shape dough into 1-inch balls and place them about 2 inches apart on an ungreased cookie sheet.
8. Flatten each ball using a fork in a crisscross pattern.
9. Bake for 8-10 minutes or until lightly browned.
10. Allow cookies to cool completely on wire racks.
11. Place 1 teaspoon of jelly on the bottom half of the cookies, then top with the remaining cookies.
